## Scope check

- [ ] This belongs in core (changes the runtime contract or affects all recipes)
- [ ] This is a new recipe under `recipes/<name>/`
- [ ] This is a new model backend implementing the `Brain` protocol
- [ ] This is a docs / DX improvement
